rulings.Case Title: MARIAN B MOHR VS. EAST WEST BANK A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 28, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery. Transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on July 18, 2017. Motion for continuation of Plaintiff's Deposition shall also be heard in Department 301 on the same date and time. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AMIT DOW ET AL VS. 1) DEAN CLEMENTS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 28, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANTS DEAN CLEMENTS, STACIE CLEMENTS, PAUL MCKENNA, JAMES GALLAGHER'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. GRANTED. Defendants' actions alleged to have occurred in 2012 fall outside the statute of limitations. While the injury from those acts might be continuous, the acts themselves are not. See Baugh v. Garl (2006) 137 Cal.App.4th 737; Vaca v. Wachovia (2011) 198 Cal.App.4th 737. Defendants' counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint in future. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIE PAYTON VS. MARCELLA FLORES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 28, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT MARCELLA FLORES' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. DENIED. Moving party fails to sustain its burden under CCP 473(b). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE HENRY AND FRANCES GAGE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. DAVID BUCKLEY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 28, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT DAVID BUCKLEY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is sufficiently alleged, including Plaintiff's capacity to sue. Complaint is not uncertain. =(501/REQ)
